# claude-managed-agents_agent_version (Data Source)

Look up a specific historical version of an agent. The upstream API only exposes a list endpoint for versions, so this data source pages through the version history and returns the entry whose `version` field matches.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a specific historical version of an agent. Useful for comparing
# the live agent to a known-good baseline, or feeding the prior config back
# into terraform when manually rolling back.

data "claude-managed-agents_agent_version" "v3" {
  agent_id = claude-managed-agents_agent.coding_assistant.id
  version  = 3
}

output "v3_system_prompt" {
  value = data.claude-managed-agents_agent_version.v3.system
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agent_id` (String) Agent id (`agent_*`).
- `version` (Number) Version number to look up. Server-managed monotonic counter starting at 1.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) ISO 8601 creation timestamp.
- `description` (String) Description at this version, or null.
- `metadata` (Map of String) Metadata at this version.
- `model` (String) Model identifier at this version.
- `name` (String) Agent name at this version.
- `system` (String) System prompt at this version, or null.
- `updated_at` (String) ISO 8601 last-modified timestamp.
